---
title: "Chapter 1 — The Real Numbers"
---

# Overview

This chapter introduces the completeness of the real numbers, supremum and
infimum, the Archimedean Property, and intervals. These ideas form the
foundation for the rest of analysis.

# Major Definitions

| Definition | Notes |
|-----------|-------|
| Supremum | Coming Soon |
| Infimum | Coming Soon |
| Least Upper Bound Property | Coming Soon |

# Theorems

| Theorem |
|----------|--------|
| [Theorem 1.1.1 – $\sqrt{2} \not \in \mathbb{Q}$](../theorems/chapter-01/theorem-1-1-1.qmd)

# Exercises

| Exercise | Status |
|----------|--------|
| [1.2.1](../exercises/chapter-01/ex-1-2-1.qmd) | ✓ |
| [1.2.2](../exercises/chapter-01/ex-1-2-2.qmd) | ✓ |
| [1.2.3](../exercises/chapter-01/ex-1-2-3.qmd) | In Progress |
